text: CRETA

Undisputed. Ultimate.

Nothing stands in comparison to the presence of Hyundai CRETA. At first glance, the design becomes sharper, more modern and progressive. Precise body lines accentuate the commanding stance. The premium SUV looks powerful, refined, and captivating with lavish surfaces highlighting the sportiness that is signature to CRETA.

Other features: Puddle lamp with welcome function   I   Chrome outside door handles   I  Front & rear skid plate

Integrated rear spoiler with LED HMSL (high mounted stop lamp) What a legend looks like.

Bold. Charismatic. Extraordinary. Hyundai CRETA is symbolic of all things impressive no matter how you look at it. Its black chrome parametric grille makes a striking impression. Its horizon LED positioning lamp & DRLs and quad beam LED headlamps in the front give the SUV an unmistakable presence on the road. The rear profile is also sculpted with refreshingly elements like the connecting LED tail lamps that announce its departure.

LED rear turn signal with sequential function Front turn signal with sequential function Horizon LED positioning lamps & DRLs Black chrome parametric radiator grille Connecting LED tail lamps Quad beam LED headlamps R18 (D=462 mm) Diamond cut alloys

Discover spatial artistry.

Overwhelming presence and discreet glamour. With its symphony of space, Hyundai CRETA is a work of art.

In Hyundai CRETA, every journey is a moving moment – even when stationary. Be it the refined cockpit or the comfortable second row, one always has the best seat. The interior is the soul of Hyundai CRETA.

Other features: Driver rear view monitor   I   Front row ventilated seats   I   Voice enabled smart panoramic sunroof 60:40 split rear seat with 2-step recline   I   Rear wireless charger Seamlessly integrated infotainment and cluster screen Rear window sunshade Driver power seat memory function Power driver & passenger seats - 8 way

Always forward thinking.

Stand above it all and yet stay completely connected with your world. When it comes to technology, connectivity and infotainment, Hyundai CRETA is equipped with the most advanced features. The innovative Hyundai Bluelink app, Home-to-Car with Alexa gives you the power to control your car from the comfort of your home or office.

Home to car (H2C) with Alexa Bose premium sound system (8 speakers) Passenger seat walkin device Other features: USB charger C-Type (Front – 1 and Rear – 2)   I   Embedded VR commands

In-built music streaming application JioSaavn (with 1 year complimentary subscription) 3 Years free Bluelink subscription with 70+ Bluelink features “Alexa, turn on my car’s AC.” Dual zone automatic temperature control (DATC) with touch control Front row seat back table with IT device holder & retractable cup holder

Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist Junction Turning (FCA-JT) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist Direct Oncoming (FCA-DO) Forward Collision -Avoidance Assist

- Pedestrian (FCA-Ped) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist

- Car (FCA-Car) & Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Forward Collision - Avoidance Assist

- Cycle (FCA-Cyl) Blind-spot Collision - Avoidance Assist (BCA) & Blind-spot Collision Warning (BCW) Lane Departure Warning (LDW) Lane Keeping Assist (LKA) Driver Attention Warning (DAW) Smart Cruise Control with Stop & Go (SCC with S&G) Safe Exit Warning (SEW) Lane Following Assist (LFA) High Beam Assist (HBA) Leading Vehicle Departure Alert (LVDA) Rear Cross - Traffic Collision - Avoidance Assist (RCCA) & Rear Cross - Traffic Collision Warning (RCCW) Hyundai CRETA is alive with Hyundai SmartSense-Level 2 ADAS. It assists the driver by deploying advanced safety features thereby making the road safe for the passengers and the pedestrians as well. Now you can look forward in a relaxed manner and devote yourself to the most important thing, the pleasure of driving.

And let the advanced driver assistance system be your reliable companion that ensures you master every challenge on the road with confidence.

Level 2 ADAS.

Protects what matters the most.

Hyundai CRETA comes equipped with 70+ advanced safety features including six airbags, as standard. This SUV is a reassuringly secure sanctuary for its occupants.

Tyre pressure monitoring system: Highline Electric parking brake with auto hold Dashcam Blind-spot view monitor (BVM) Surround view monitor (SVM) 6 Airbags standard Other features: ECM mirror with SOS button   I   ISOFIX   I   Front and rear parking sensors 36 Standard safety features 6 airbags ESC VSM HAC All wheel disc brakes New New

Adrenaline in DNA.

Powerfully distinctive design, impressive dimensions – Hyundai CRETA is an ultimate example of what happens when technological vision becomes a reality. It is as intrepid as it is agile. With the 1.5l petrol turbo under the hood, you would never be left wanting for power.

1.5l Petrol [6MT and IVT]

1.5l Diesel [6MT and 6AT]

1.5l Petrol turbo [7DCT] Normal Eco Sport Paddle shifters Traction control modes (snow, mud, sand) Drive modes

Knight has arrived.

If dark is your style, CRETA Knight will make you fall in love with it at the very first sight. Exuding great style and sophistication, it truly stands out with its all-black exteriors and an equally classy interiors with brass inserts.

It combines great looks with legendary performance and lavish comfort. Go for it. Be undisputed. Be ultimate.

Other features : Exclusive Knight emblem   I   Front & rear black painted skid plate   I   Matte black Hyundai and CRETA emblems black painted parametric radiator grille   I   Exclusive black upholstery with brass stitch & piping All black interiors with brass coloured inserts Black alloys with red calipers Sporty metal pedals

Other key features in EX(O) SE^: Quad beam LED headlamps  I  Horizon LED positioning lamp & DRLs LED tail lamps  I  R16 (D = 405.6 mm) Dual tone styled steel wheel Hyundai CRETA Summer Edition.

Introducing This season, drive home the new Hyundai CRETA Summer Edition - designed to keep you refreshed, stylish, and unstoppable. Packed with everything you need to get going, it is more than just a drive, it is your flight away from the ordinary.

Dashcam Now available in S(O) SE^, S(O) Knight SE^ & SX SE^

^SE stands for summer edition.

Rear window sunshade Now available in EX(O) SE^ Rear camera with dynamic guidelines Now available in EX(O) SE^ Smart key with push button start and motion sensor Now available in EX SE^ & EX(O) SE^

26.03 cm (10.25”) Multi display digital cluster Now available in SX SE^ & SX Premium SE^ Blind-spot view monitor (BVM) Now available in SX Premium SE^ Surround view monitor (SVM) Now available in SX Premium SE^ Front parking sensors Now available in SX Premium SE^

A king among legends.

A decade of being the SUV of choice has made every single CRETA a legend in its own right. Each with its own story, with its own journey. And amongst these legends, a king is now born. The limited-edition CRETA King.

It is everything that the legend is, and a lot more.

King Limited Edition is based on King Knight Trim.

Available in Abyss black, Atlas white, Black matte color.

Available with 1.5L MPi Petrol engine (iVT) and 1.5L U2 CRDi Diesel engine (6-speed AT) Dashcam Carpet mat Seat belt cover Headrest cushion King emblem Wireless Android Auto & Apple CarPlay~ Door cladding Key cover

Shades of individuality.

Hyundai CRETA comes in the shade of your individuality. Choose from an array of new and classic hues that best complement your style.

Exterior colours Titanium black Robust emerald pearl Atlas white Atlas white with black roof Titan grey Titan grey matte Starry night Titanium black matte Colors availability may vary by trims.

New

All black interiors with brass coloured inserts.

Extended Warranty and Shield of Trust Packages are on payable basis. Functionality and deployment of airbags depends upon multiple factors, please refer owners’ manual to know more.
